productDisplayName: Nike Men Manchester United White Tshirts
description: CompositionWhite round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has fabric tape detailing on the inseam of the neckline and print on the chestFittingRegularWash careonly machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like coloursDo not bleachTumble dry lowRemove immediatelyCool iron, but do not iron on designManchester United's impressive run this season hasn't been solely because of Rooney's good form or Chicharito's vision, it's been much more than that. Under Sir Alex Ferguson, ManUtd has adopted a 'never say die' culture that has always helped the Red Devil's. Support this 'never say die' spirit with this Man United Core T-Shirt. It features a bold graphic of 'Never Say Die' proudly scripted across the front of the tee, while the upper back features an additional 'Yeah I Sez It' with a small ManUtd logo showing off your team pride. Team it with denims and boots for a great look.
